name: Banana/Applesauce Bread/Low Fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly coat a 9x5-inch pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine the first six ingredients; set aside.
4. In another large bowl, beat egg whites until foamy.
5. Add bananas, buttermilk, applesauce, and vanilla to the egg white mixture. Stir until just blended.
6. Mix in the nuts.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 45 to 55 minutes or until golden.
8. Serves 12, with 215 Calories per serving. If walnuts are omitted, calories per serving reduce to 183 and fat to 0.5 grams.
